name: Brunswick Stew#1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound ham, lean (cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut up a pound of chicken and put it in a large pan with three quarts of water, one large onion, and half a pound of lean ham cut into small pieces.
2. Simmer gently for two hours.
3. Add three pints of tomatoes, one pint of lima beans, four large Irish potatoes diced, one pint of grated corn, one tablespoon of salt, and one fourth teaspoon pepper.
4. Cover and simmer gently for another hour, stirring frequently to prevent scorching.
5. Add three ounces of butter and serve hot.
Note: This makes a lot of stew. You will probably want to halve or even quarter it if you want to try it before serving to a group.
